setup.note: Official Figma remote MCP server. Figma docs say only clients listed in the Figma MCP Catalog can connect; new clients may need to join the waitlist. The server uses Figma OAuth and can write to Figma/FigJam canvases, so write actions should require review. Reference: https://developers.figma.com/docs/figma-mcp-server/remote-server-installation/
